mapper.sql: SELECT b.booking_id, b.book_no, b.emp_no, b.user_id, b.room_id, r.room_name, b.book_date, b.start_time, b.end_time, b.meeting_id, b.book_status, b.book_purpose, b.cancel_reason, b.version, b.create_by, b.create_time, b.update_by, b.update_time, b.remark FROM room_booking b LEFT JOIN meeting_room r ON r.room_id = b.room_id
mapper.select: SELECT booking_id, book_no, emp_no, user_id, room_id, book_date, start_time, end_time, meeting_id, book_status, book_purpose, cancel_reason, version, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark FROM room_booking WHERE booking_id = #{bookingId} FOR UPDATE

SELECT booking_id, book_no, emp_no, user_id, room_id, book_date, start_time, end_time, meeting_id, book_status, book_purpose, cancel_reason, version, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark FROM room_booking WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND book_date = #{bookDate} AND book_status IN ('0', '1') ORDER BY start_time
mapper.update: UPDATE room_booking SET room_id = #{roomId}, book_date = #{bookDate}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, book_purpose = #{bookPurpose}, book_status = #{bookStatus}, version = version + 1, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE booking_id = #{bookingId} AND version = #{version}
UPDATE room_booking SET book_status = '2', cancel_reason = #{cancelReason}, version = version + 1, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE booking_id = #{bookingId}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM room_booking WHERE booking_id IN
#{bookingId}
